_meta.source: StarLadder Major Budapest 2025 | A — spirit-vs-falcons-m2-dust2 auto-captions
_meta.alignment: REAL: kills↔name-mentions cross-correlation. offset=10274s (171min), confidence=4.6sigma, 46/187 (25%) kills anchored. The offset is solid; the low % is lossy auto-caption ASR (names like NiKo/TeSeS not transcribed), so per-line timing is good to a few seconds + pause drift, not frame-exact. Tick ranges are absolute demo ticks.
